title: containers-mounts.conf.5.md in two repositories
body:
/kind bug

I noticed that the file containers-mounts.conf.5.md is located in two different repositories.

first repository: https://github.com/containers/common/blob/master/docs/containers-mounts.conf.5.md
second repository: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/docs/source/markdown/containers-mounts.conf.5.md

Both files are identical. 

Is this desired or a mistake?

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out.  The source of truth should be the one in containers/common since the corresponding code lives there.  I'll open a PR to delete the file from the Podman repo.
